body.title: Establish HYPOTHESIZE success-rate baseline from existing flight-recorder logs
body.result: Apr 2026 baseline: ~0% HYPOTHESIZE success rate; published to palace.metrics.pe_chain_baseline; target 40% by 2026-06-18
body.description:
pe_chain has been failing for 7 weeks with no published success-rate baseline. Compute per-day HYPOTHESIZE success/error rate from existing flight-recorder logs (last 30 days) and publish as a palace node or slate report, setting a 30-day improvement target.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (log source), lab/claudecode/ (report script output)
**Design rules:** no new data collection — compute from existing flight-recorder logs only
**Scope boundary:** in scope: query existing pe_chain flight-recorder logs for HYPOTHESIZE outcomes, compute daily success rate, output to palace node or slate. Out of scope: algorithmic changes to pe_chain, new logging instrumentation, UI.
**Test plan:** report script produces output without error on current log data; output includes at least 7 days of history if logs exist; result published to palace.metrics.pe_chain_baseline or equivalent.
